root.name: Battle Observer
root.description: Interface and Battle Statistics Enhancements 1. Display of team health (HP of individual tanks + strength difference) 2. Log of dealt and received damage 3. Counter of active and destroyed tanks 4. An updated PING and FPS panels 5. Customizable battle timer 6. Player stats in battle (WG rating only) 7. Modified base capture indicators 8. Damage counter for “High Caliber” medal 9. Display of your tanks HP in a visible spot 10. Highlighting players with hidden names in team lists 11. Clock in garage and battle Camera Aiming and Visual Settings 1. Dynamic camera zoom based on distance 2. Maximum camera distance 3. Projectile flight time indicator 4. Improved aiming circle and server reticle (size, stabilization timer) 5. Centering the minimap via hotkey + info about destroyed tanks (icon/name) 6. Customization of icons in team lists (brightness, color) 7. Armor calculator: actual thickness + reticle color change 8. Distance to the nearest spotted enemy (no direction) 9. Disable effects: shaking, flashes, blackout in sniper mode 10. Disable commander voiceovers 11. Auto-exit sniper mode after firing (optional) 12. Customization of “Sixth Sense” icon (timer, animation, image) Team System and Utility Features 1. Auto-clear game cache on exit 2. Highlighting friends/clanmates in team lists with a special symbol 3. Message filtering in system chat 4. Check slot availability for map blacklist 5. Tank performance widget in a garage (damage, spotting, blocking, stun, gun mark progress) 6. Auto-toggle “speed up crew training” based on field modifications 7. Auto-collection of clan rewards 8. Disable base capture siren Post-Destruction Modes 1. After death, the camera anchors to the last-known position 2. Adjust camera distance after being destroyed
